Why did the programmer always carry a pencil? They preferred to write in C#.
Why did the programmer's wife leave him? He didn't know how to commit.
Why would a guitarist become a good programmer? He's adept at riffing in C#.
Why did the developer break up with their keyboard? It just wasn't their type anymore.
Why dot net developers don't wear glasses? Because they see sharp.
3 SQL statements walk into a NoSQL bar. Soon, they walk out They couldn't find a table.
Why did the programmer quit his job? Because he didn't get arrays.
Why don't programmers like nature? There's too many bugs.
How do you generate a random string? Put a Windows user in front of Vim and tell them to exit.
The punchline often arrives before the set-up. Do you know the problem with UDP jokes?
What did the beaver say to the tree? It's been nice gnawing you.
What do you get when you cross a bee and a sheep? A bah-humbug.
What did the digital clock say to the grandfather clock? Look, no hands!
Why couldn't the bicycle stand up by itself? It was two-tired.
What do you call a laughing motorcycle? A Yamahahahaha.
Why did the opera singer go sailing? They wanted to hit the high Cs.
What do you call a duck that gets all A's? A wise quacker.
What do you call a pile of cats? A Meowtain.
Why do bees hum? Because they don't know the words.
What did the left eye say to the right eye? Between us, something smells!

Knock knock. 
 Who's there? 
 Hatch. 
 Hatch who? Bless you!

Knock knock. 
 Who's there? 
 Cows go. 
 Cows go who? No, cows go moo.

Knock knock. 
 Who's there? 
 A broken pencil. 
 A broken pencil who? Never mind. It's pointless.

Knock knock. 
 Who's there? 
 Little old lady. 
 Little old lady who? I didn't know you could yodel!

Knock knock. 
 Who's there? 
 Opportunity. That is impossible. Opportunity doesn’t come knocking twice!
